name: December Holiday - The Holidays
description:
It's a few days before Christmas, and due to her house becoming very festive this time of year, she decides to raid your place. Hope you like the presence of the tomboy deer!

-------------------------------

I've seen the messages number. I've seen what y'all want.
You win.
I hope you're happy.
So before you comment:

No more Dess bots from me. I'll make some more DELTARUNE bots, but no more Dess.
creator: tiredTheorist
